title: Device Settings - Pair Headset with Charge Stand
scenario: Charge Stand info appears in Device Settings > Software Update tab when headset is placed on stand, and persists after removing headset, restarting device, and restarting app
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Pair the headset with the app via the Home screen (if not already paired).
3. Ensure the headset is NOT yet paired with the Charge Stand.
4. Place the headset onto the Charge Stand.
5. Navigate to Device Settings → [Headset Name] → Software Update tab.
6. Observe whether the Charge Stand info appears in the Software Update tab.
7. Remove the headset from the Charge Stand.
8. Check the Software Update tab again to see if the Charge Stand info persists.
10. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Device Settings → [Headset Name] → Software Update tab.
11. Observe whether the Charge Stand info is still present.
12. Close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
13. Navigate again to Device Settings → [Headset Name] → Software Update tab.
14. Observe whether the Charge Stand info persists after the app restart.
expected: The Charge Stand info appears in Device Settings > Software Update tab after placing the headset on the stand, and persists after removing the headset from the stand, restarting the device, and restarting the app.
